channel.title: nomeatdisco TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from nomeatdisco

item.title: ALL OF THIS IS VEGAN SOUP 🍜 Full recipes on Substack, link in bio. I’ve also given you a full recipe pack a shopping list, this brings an end to Slurp my Soup… for now!! #vegan #plantbased #veganuary #soupseason #soup
item.description: ALL OF THIS IS VEGAN SOUP 🍜 Full recipes on Substack, link in bio. I’ve also given you a full recipe pack a shopping list, this brings an end to Slurp my Soup… for now!! #vegan #plantbased #veganuary #soupseason #soup

item.title: HOW TO MAKE A GINGER SPRITZ 🫚 Me and Molly are being more intentional with what we put it our bodies this year. Starting with a daily life shot of ginger! Ingredients 1 heaped tbsp grated ginger 2 tbsp organic apple cider vinegar Juice of a lemon 1 tbs
item.description: HOW TO MAKE A GINGER SPRITZ 🫚 Me and Molly are being more intentional with what we put it our bodies this year. Starting with a daily life shot of ginger! Ingredients 1 heaped tbsp grated ginger 2 tbsp organic apple cider vinegar Juice of a lemon 1 tbs

item.title: BLT IN A LEMON & ZA’ATAR FOCACCIA 🥪 Full recipe is on my substack or website(link in bio) #vegan #sandwich #veganuary #plantbased #blt

item.title: TWO THINGS I’M DOING THIS YEAR TO GET OUTDOORS MORE 🏕️ One of my resolutions this year was to get outside even more than I did last year! Not finding an easy excuse to stay indoors and watch TV. With the help from @Passenger Molly and I have challenge

item.title: GOCHUJANG, SPRING ONION & CORIANDER FOCACCIA with a crumbled tempeh and smashed cucumber filling 🥪 Full recipe is on my substack or website(link in bio) Or comment ‘SANDWICH’ and I’ll send you the recipe! #vegan #sandwich #veganuary #plantbased #blt

item.title: NEW EPISODE LIVE ON YOUTUBE!!!🌶️ 7 ingredients. Big flavour. Full recipe + video via the link in my bio. Don’t forget to like and subscribe! All shot and edited by the amazing @henryhayhay #vegan #udon #koreanfood #mushrooms #noodlerecipe

item.title: BUT WHERE DO VEGAN’S GET THEIR PROTEIN….? I can help you find out. I’ve created a full weekly dinner pack with all macros and a shopping list for you. FOR FREE ON MY SUBSTACK IN THE LINK IN MY BIO x #vegan #protein #veganprotein #plantbased #meat
item.description: BUT WHERE DO VEGAN’S GET THEIR PROTEIN….? I can help you find out. I’ve created a full weekly dinner pack with all macros and a shopping list for you. FOR FREE ON MY SUBSTACK IN THE LINK IN MY BIO x #vegan #protein #veganprotein #plantbased #meat

item.title: BUFFALO PARSNIPS 🥕 These might be one of the best things I’ve ever eaten. Whether you eat meat or love a good old fashioned vegetable. Then this one’s for you! Seasonal veg reimagined into the classics! Ingredients 4-5 medium parsnips For the batter:
item.description: BUFFALO PARSNIPS 🥕 These might be one of the best things I’ve ever eaten. Whether you eat meat or love a good old fashioned vegetable. Then this one’s for you! Seasonal veg reimagined into the classics! Ingredients 4-5 medium parsnips For the batter:

item.title: I DON’T ACTUALLY LIKE PANCAKE DAY…. 🥞 Now don’t get me wrong, I don’t hate pancakes but I’ve never been mad on them, but @mollyclarkie is obsessed. So it’s my duty to fulfil her needs every year! But this one’s for me…. Sorry Molly 🧡 Ingredients 1 enoki
item.description: I DON’T ACTUALLY LIKE PANCAKE DAY…. 🥞 Now don’t get me wrong, I don’t hate pancakes but I’ve never been mad on them, but @mollyclarkie is obsessed. So it’s my duty to fulfil her needs every year! But this one’s for me…. Sorry Molly 🧡 Ingredients 1 enoki

item.title: SALT & PEPPER MUSHIES 🍄 I was always a massive fan of Friday nights in the 90’s as a kid. Get a takeaway, rent a movie from blockbuster and get a takeaway. My pick was always a Chinese and one of my fav dishes is always salt and pepper mushies! So I recr

item.title: TOFU CAESAR WRAP 🥪 This is for all you kids out there wanting something better in your lunch box. Parents you’ve got your work cut out! Ingredients For the tofu: 1 block firm tofu 1 cup panko breadcrumbs 1 cup flour 1 cup water 1 tbsp all purpose seas
item.description: TOFU CAESAR WRAP 🥪 This is for all you kids out there wanting something better in your lunch box. Parents you’ve got your work cut out! Ingredients For the tofu: 1 block firm tofu 1 cup panko breadcrumbs 1 cup flour 1 cup water 1 tbsp all purpose seas

item.title: COOK THE BOOK EP. 9 - THE HAPPY PEAR 20 year celebration! Well how could I not cook a recipe from the legends that are @The Happy Pear Both from Dublin and absolute legends in the plant based world! You can go grab their books and produce online now!!
item.description: COOK THE BOOK EP. 9 - THE HAPPY PEAR 20 year celebration! Well how could I not cook a recipe from the legends that are @The Happy Pear Both from Dublin and absolute legends in the plant based world! You can go grab their books and produce online now!!

item.title: Writing a cookbook definitely takes a village, it’s something I’m super proud of and it definitely didn’t start just last year. I’ve been working on this my whole life… from my grandma’s kitchen to now. and this is only the beginning… it means the world
item.description: Writing a cookbook definitely takes a village, it’s something I’m super proud of and it definitely didn’t start just last year. I’ve been working on this my whole life… from my grandma’s kitchen to now. and this is only the beginning… it means the world

item.title: PEANUT BUTTER & JAM ON TOAST COOKIES 🍪 If you haven’t seen this recipe by @lungisalwaysbaking then you need to run and make it! I’ve made a vegan version for you guys and threw a curve ball and added peanut butter in there! Makes 6-8 Large Cookies Ingre
item.description: PEANUT BUTTER & JAM ON TOAST COOKIES 🍪 If you haven’t seen this recipe by @lungisalwaysbaking then you need to run and make it! I’ve made a vegan version for you guys and threw a curve ball and added peanut butter in there! Makes 6-8 Large Cookies Ingre

item.title: NEW YOUTUBE IS LIVE!!!! This week we have ‘SPANAKOPITA STYLE CHARRED TENDER-STEM & CREAMY MASHED CHICKPEA FLATBREAD’ it was unreal! All cooked in the @gozney tread for the series ‘Anything but Pizaa’ where I show you everything you can cook in a pizza o

item.title: ROASTED TOMATO BUTTER BEAN BOWL 🍅 Creative ruts happen often when you’re a creator. I’ve most definitely been demotivated by many things to do with social media which I feel is affecting my recipes on here. So I simplified this one for you guys. Hopefull
item.description: ROASTED TOMATO BUTTER BEAN BOWL 🍅 Creative ruts happen often when you’re a creator. I’ve most definitely been demotivated by many things to do with social media which I feel is affecting my recipes on here. So I simplified this one for you guys. Hopefull

item.title: BUFFALO TOFU JACKET POTATO 🥔 That British classic, usually filled with tuna mayo or cheeses beans has been elevated with an American classic of buffalo chicken, made with tofu. Comment whether you think this is a worthy topping to the British classic?
item.description: BUFFALO TOFU JACKET POTATO 🥔 That British classic, usually filled with tuna mayo or cheeses beans has been elevated with an American classic of buffalo chicken, made with tofu. Comment whether you think this is a worthy topping to the British classic?

item.title: A LOVE LETTER TO MY NAN 🧡 Let's see if we can get @Jamie Oliver to see this. As I think I owe him a thank you from me and my Welsh nini x You can find this recipe in his cookbook. ...and I'd love it and appreciate it if you could pre-order mine, in the li
item.description: A LOVE LETTER TO MY NAN 🧡 Let's see if we can get @Jamie Oliver to see this. As I think I owe him a thank you from me and my Welsh nini x You can find this recipe in his cookbook. ...and I'd love it and appreciate it if you could pre-order mine, in the li

item.title: You’ll have to ask Molly for the recipe… 🤭 Baby Disco coming August ‘26 and we are beyond excited and filled with so much love … 😁🧡 #baby #babyannouncement
item.description: You’ll have to ask Molly for the recipe… 🤭 Baby Disco coming August ‘26 and we are beyond excited and filled with so much love … 😁🧡 #baby #babyannouncement

item.title: NEW RECIPE UP ON MY YOUTUBE 🎥 This week we have an N’Duja Penne alla Vodka . One of my favourite recipes we’ve created to date! You can find the link in my bio :-) Big love to @henryhayhay as always for the videography and edit! #vegan #plantbased #pa

item.description: No Description

item.title: THE STRUGGLES OF BEING A CREATOR…. This last year has been a tough one for me as a creator. As a kid from the 90’s on the cusp of the technology boom and always loving a more analog life, I came into this world not wanting to become and influencer. Being
item.description: THE STRUGGLES OF BEING A CREATOR…. This last year has been a tough one for me as a creator. As a kid from the 90’s on the cusp of the technology boom and always loving a more analog life, I came into this world not wanting to become and influencer. Being

item.title: NEW SERIES!! - BUMP TO PLATE 👶 You might’ve seen… me and Molly are having a baby 🤍 And every week, the baby grows it gets compared to a fruit or veg. So I’m turning that into a recipe series. Week 17: a pomegranate. At this stage, baby’s: • developing s
item.description: NEW SERIES!! - BUMP TO PLATE 👶 You might’ve seen… me and Molly are having a baby 🤍 And every week, the baby grows it gets compared to a fruit or veg. So I’m turning that into a recipe series. Week 17: a pomegranate. At this stage, baby’s: • developing s

item.title: I JUST BLOODY LOVE MAKING FOOD 🍲 If you love food as much as much. Be sure to check out my website www.nomeatdisco.com for all my recipes. Oh and my substack for cooking tips, music playlists and a bit more about my life. Oh and to top it all off, I hav
item.description: I JUST BLOODY LOVE MAKING FOOD 🍲 If you love food as much as much. Be sure to check out my website www.nomeatdisco.com for all my recipes. Oh and my substack for cooking tips, music playlists and a bit more about my life. Oh and to top it all off, I hav

item.title: SMASH BURGER TACOS 🌮 Oh Lordy lord these were good! Do you reckon you’d give these a go? Ingredients 1 @beyondmeat patty 1 cheese square (@cathedral_city_uk always) 2 tbsp mayo 1 tbsp ketchup 1 tbsp mustard 1 tbsp pickle brine 1 tsp paprika Half white
item.description: SMASH BURGER TACOS 🌮 Oh Lordy lord these were good! Do you reckon you’d give these a go? Ingredients 1 @beyondmeat patty 1 cheese square (@cathedral_city_uk always) 2 tbsp mayo 1 tbsp ketchup 1 tbsp mustard 1 tbsp pickle brine 1 tsp paprika Half white

item.title: MY DEBUT COOKBOOK IS AVAILABLE TO PRE-ORDER NOW!!! NO MEAT DISCO - A Seven Ingredient Cookbook SEPTEMBER 2026. Pre order now x The link is in my bio x Love you all and I owe this one to all of you, I can’t wait for you guys to get your hands on it. 🧡 @Li
item.description: MY DEBUT COOKBOOK IS AVAILABLE TO PRE-ORDER NOW!!! NO MEAT DISCO - A Seven Ingredient Cookbook SEPTEMBER 2026. Pre order now x The link is in my bio x Love you all and I owe this one to all of you, I can’t wait for you guys to get your hands on it. 🧡 @Li
